description: Set up CI/CD for a Node.js monorepo with 3 packages
input: I have a monorepo with packages/api, packages/web, and packages/shared. I want CI that only builds what changed and deploys to staging on merge to main. Using GitHub Actions.
Our CI pipeline takes 25 minutes. It installs dependencies, runs lint, unit tests, integration tests, builds a Docker image, and pushes to ECR. How can I make it faster?

description: Implement blue-green deployment for a Kubernetes application
input: We want to implement blue-green deployments for our Kubernetes app so we can instantly roll back if something goes wrong. How do we set this up?

description: Write a Dockerfile for a Python FastAPI application
input: I need a production-ready Dockerfile for a Python FastAPI app. It should be secure, small, and build quickly in CI.

description: Set up OIDC authentication for GitHub Actions to deploy to AWS
input: I want my GitHub Actions workflow to deploy to AWS without storing long-lived AWS access keys as secrets. How do I set up OIDC?
